heroSubtitle: Browse our scheduled virtual training sessions. Enroll online and join from anywhere.

courses.title: AI Foundations for Healthcare
courses.description: A comprehensive introduction to AI for healthcare professionals. Learn what AI can do, how to use it responsibly, and where it fits in your daily work.
courses.audience: All healthcare staff — clinical, administrative, and leadership
topics: AI ethics and responsible use in healthcare
Identifying AI opportunities in your role

courses.title: AI for Healthcare Leaders
courses.description: Strategic AI training designed for executives, directors, and managers. Understand the AI landscape, evaluate vendor solutions, and build an AI roadmap for your organization.

courses.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot for End Users (AB-730)
courses.description: Official Microsoft course on adopting Copilot across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams. Hands-on labs included.

courses.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot for Admins (AB-900)
courses.description: Official Microsoft course for IT administrators deploying and managing Copilot across your organization. Covers licensing, security, governance, and rollout planning.
courses.audience: IT administrators, M365 admins, and technical leads

ctaTitle: Need training for your whole team?
ctaSubtitle: We bring our training on site — customized for your organization, your tools, and your workflows.
